{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205080348CF89C6E62ACF29831C"}"},"total":1623},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7286144652658557733","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这才是真正的农村题材小说，猪脚朴实无华却为了全家幸福而默默付出，把八十年代的农村刻画的生动形象。没有华丽的词语却多了农村的家长里短和人间烟火气，希望作者继续加油，后面不要跑偏了。","text_exts":[{"e":70,"s":66,"text":"人间烟火","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E9%97%B4%E7%83%9F%E7%81%AB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774127283CF29831C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227286144652658557733%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227224697685842857017%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E9%97%B4%E7%83%9F%E7%81%AB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696439045,"group_id":"7224697685842857017","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz7lEY5BdlC+rTBbjTba2Po=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700848&x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"95295794695","user_name":"喜欢诺丁汉的柳溪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"95295794695","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1723155564,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7224697685842857017","book_info":{"abstract":"【纯正年代文+无空间无系统+单女主+宠妻宠女+打猎+挖人参+经商+萌宠+美食+种田文】
身价十几个亿的黄金单身汉许大海重生回到了1984年的东北，自己老婆和女儿死亡的那一天！生死时速，一定要救下她们！
这一辈子一定要弥补上一世的遗憾，加倍的补偿老婆和女儿！让她们过上好日子！
